ranked_jobs.title: Product Manager, Stripe Infrastructure
why: Role focuses on large-scale infrastructure and distributed systems supporting Stripe’s products, aligning well with enterprise platform transformation and system modernization.

Responsibilities include guiding architecture and investment decisions with trade-offs between build vs buy and platform vs point solution, which matches platform governance and operating model redesign preferences.
Position is fully remote in the US, which fits the preferred remote work arrangement.
Role requires managing diverse stakeholders and driving cross-functional alignment, consistent with enterprise-scale impact.

ranked_jobs.title: Product Manager, Commerce Systems
why: Focus on harmonizing and unifying multiple disparate internal systems into a single platform fits enterprise platform transformation and modernization
Role requires working across multiple internal stakeholders (engineering, GTM, finance, legal), indicating cross-functional operating model design
Remote full-time role with strong emphasis on large-scale backend systems and platform infrastructure
Responsibility for reducing integration friction and accelerating time-to-market aligns with platform consolidation and modernization principles
Preferred qualifications around fintech and multi-product platforms align well with enterprise-scale platform work

ranked_jobs.title: Technical Program Manager, Internal Systems
why: Role is a full-time, US remote Technical Program Manager position at a major enterprise platform company (Stripe), matching remote and platform criteria.

The job focuses on managing large-scale technical programs spanning multiple engineering teams, indicating a broad, cross-functional scope aligned with platform transformation and system modernization.
Responsibilities include shaping technical design, identifying trade-offs, and driving consensus across dynamic teams, suggesting engagement with operating model and governance aspects.
The role involves working with internal systems and finance domains, implying internal platform and system consolidation focus rather than external customer implementations.

ranked_jobs.title: Technical Program Manager, People Solutions
why: Role involves strategic technical roadmapping and system design aligned with enterprise platform transformation principles
Strong cross-functional collaboration across multiple business units including People, Finance, Corporate Technology, indicating enterprise-wide impact
Emphasis on process and technical solutions delivery to enhance employee experience, which aligns with platform modernization
Remote and multiple US and Canada locations available, increasing candidate flexibility

ranked_jobs.title: Staff Product Manager
why: Role involves leading complex, cross-functional initiatives spanning multiple teams and systems, indicating enterprise-scale scope and transformation
Focus on defining multi-quarter product vision and strategy aligned to highest company priorities indicates strategic rigor
Requires deep domain expertise in financial infrastructure and technical fluency, suitable for platform modernization
Opportunity to work on scalable technical systems and architectural tradeoffs, which aligns with platform/system consolidation and modernization
Role includes elevating product craft and operating standards across the organization, intersecting with operating model redesign
